original_statement: "The Opta supercomputer currently makes England a 30.4% shot to reach the last four this summer."
statement_topic: FIFA World Cup 2026 - England reach semifinal
statement_context: Excerpt from Opta Group L preview published by The Analyst on 2026-06-04. Uses 25,000 simulations.
resolution_criteria: England appears in the official FIFA semifinal fixture per official FIFA knockout results published on or before 2026-07-15.
source_text_snippet: The Opta supercomputer currently makes England a 30.4% shot to reach the last four this summer.
